structure_type: layered (van der Waals gap between FeS sheets)

barriers.note: ML underestimates by ~0.3 eV vs DFT
Through the VdW gap — prohibitively high without water
Direct hop through vacuum gap — effectively blocked

barriers.method: literature (Marx et al. 2006; Jia et al. 2024)
barriers.note: Proton transfer along H-bond network in hydrated interlayer. Our NEB calculation in progress.

key_insight: Dry mackinawite: intra-layer hop at ~0.7 eV (moderate conductor). Hydrated mackinawite: Grotthuss mechanism through interlayer water at ~0 eV (fast proton transport). Layered structure is key — interlayer water provides the fast pathway.

vacancy_formation.note: Higher than pentlandite — fewer intrinsic vacancies, but Grotthuss pathway bypasses vacancy requirement

literature_comparison.note: Our intra-layer barrier (0.74 eV) falls within the independent literature range
